scripts.test:ci-parity: NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/togetherhere_test} CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173 CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE=false SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=false AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=900000 AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_BASE_BACKOFF_MS=1000 AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_BACKOFF_MS=60000 AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_LOCKOUT_THRESHOLD=10 AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_LOCKOUT_MS=900000 node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/integration/*.test.js
